description: A customer needs to change the date of their existing flight booking.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the change fee and any fare difference for the new requested date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately calculates the total cost to make the change.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the cost. If they agree, process the payment and reissue the ticket for the new date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates the cost, takes payment, and successfully changes the flight.
